title: Gaze Upon A World
description:
You are the Valcon Knight. You have one job; kill the shardbearers and slay the corrupted god of shadow, Umbrocron for his crimes against this world.

"Log 23 - Inside the strange bunker we found runic inscriptions, the other cartographers thought it was just a different mutation of Xatrac, but I realized there were no symbols in common with our variation. It's fascinating! But I can't help but wonder, what happened here? It looks like it's been abandoned for decades, but there's still some strange power source."

"Log 24 - These lights keep flickering in the distant halls. I have copied down these symbols in my second journal. It's definitely odd... These walls are made out of a pure metal I have never seen before, nothing can dent nor scratch it. The others have moved on, mapping this place will be fun!"

- Unnamed Cartographer
